testcase.name: clickonmypromt
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.UnhandledAlertException: Dismissed user prompt dialog: Do you want to confirm: Build info: version: '4.25.0', revision: '8a8aea2337' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver Command: [60ad009a-6cdb-41b7-b115-8197e263dbcf, findElement {value=//*[@onclick='myprompt()'], using=xpath}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, browserVersion: 123.0, moz:accessibilityChecks: false, moz:buildID: 20240213221259, moz:debuggerAddress: 127.0.0.1:32744, moz:firefoxOptions: {prefs: {remote.active-protocols: 3}}, moz:geckodriverVersion: 0.34.0, moz:headless: false, moz:platformVersion: platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:bidiEnabled: false, se:cdp: ws://172.18.0.3:4444/sessio..., se:cdpVersion: 85.0, se:noVncPort: 7900, se:vnc: ws://172.18.0.3:4444/sessio..., se:vncEnabled: true, se:vncLocalAddress: ws://172.18.0.3:7900, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and
